Actions.use_case: Full management of managed disks attached to the Rubrik cluster VMs (create, read, update, delete, snapshot access).
List compute SKUs available in the target region when sizing Rubrik cluster nodes.
Delete Rubrik cluster VMs during scale-down, replacement, or teardown.
Read the configuration of Rubrik cluster VMs during management operations.
Provision or update Rubrik cluster VMs.
Delete Rubrik cluster network interfaces during scale-down or teardown.
Read NIC IP configurations on Rubrik cluster nodes.
Attach Rubrik cluster VMs to existing network interfaces.
Discover and read network interfaces attached to Rubrik cluster nodes.
Create or update network interfaces for Rubrik cluster nodes.
Attach Rubrik cluster network interfaces to a network security group.
Read network security group rules applicable to the Rubrik cluster.
Discover virtual networks available for placing the Rubrik cluster.
Discover subnets available for placing Rubrik cluster nodes.
Place Rubrik cluster network interfaces into an existing subnet.
Validate names for Rubrik cluster resources before creation.
List Azure regions available in the customer's subscription for cluster placement.
List or read resource groups in the customer's subscription.
Enumerate resources within a resource group during cluster lifecycle operations.
Create the resource group that hosts the Rubrik cluster.
Enumerate resources at the subscription level during cluster discovery and lifecycle.
Required for accessing container for CCES. CCES needs storage container key during bootstrap.
Read properties of storage accounts used as the Rubrik cluster backing store.
List or read blob container metadata in the cluster's backing storage.
Create blob containers used by the Rubrik cluster as its data store.
Delete blob containers when the cluster is decommissioned or storage is reconfigured.
